title: hieracium heterogynum subsp. crepidifolium
intro: Hieracium heterogynum subsp. crepidifolium, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium heterogynum subsp. crepidifolium include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Hieracium heterogynum subsp. crepidifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine.
